Review Macro?

Macro PDF Editor earns praise for fast, intuitive navigation that makes large, complex documents less painful to handle. Reviewers highlight smooth tabbed browsing, helpful AI prompts, and reliable tools for splitting, annotating, and editing—especially useful for research, legal, and contract work. Users like the clean, minimalist design and privacy-minded feel. Some note rough edges with AI-driven edits and saving issues, plus requests for broader platform support. Overall sentiment: a polished, efficient workflow booster that reduces friction with hefty PDFs and cross-references while feeling modern and lightweight.

Marked 3

What do you think? …

Jacob Beckerman
Macro

Macro

Hey Product Hunt!

I'm Jacob, the founder and CEO of Macro, an open source, all-in-one workspace.

In our last startup, we ran on Slack + Linear + Notion + Superhuman + 17 other tools. All of these are fine individually but as we scaled it became chaotic to manage, and information was everywhere.

We built Macro to replace siloed apps and put them all into a unified workspace with shared AI memory.

Already Macro has: [...] Give it a try: 

Dipankar Sarkar

The unified surface demos well, but the hard part is team memory respecting permissions at retrieval time. If I query 'the workspace' and the answer lives in a doc or DM I'm not on, does retrieval enforce ACLs per chunk, or is the index shared and you filter after? We built agent memory over mixed-permission sources and the lesson was that access control has to live inside retrieval, not the prompt, or the model will happily quote something the user was never allowed to see. Being open source makes that auditable, which is a real plus.

Vikram

Huge shoutout for going open source with this 👏 @jacob\_beckerman qq Is there a native desktop app with global shortcuts for quick capture, or is everything running out of the browser for now?

Zehra [...] Already Macro has:

Email inspired by Superhuman, with better AI for triaging ("Signal vs. Noise")

Notion-like documents with fast CRDT's instead of last-write-wins, @linked to everything

Messaging, like Slack, but more focused for deep work

Linear-like tasks but deeply integrated with channels, auto-created and auto-assigned

Video calls with Google Meet performance that are transcribed and added to your team

A unified brain for all of this, in one place, and much more

We've also chosen to be open source in order to keep customizability at the core of our company. You can check out the repo here  and see what we're building in the Pull Requests tab.

Macro is an ambitious project. But that's also what makes it so useful and fun to work on.

Give it a try: 

Dipankar Sarkar

results.title: Solo: Your Gig Business App - App Store
results.content: to their “engineers” and then give you free credits to just use to schedule more “guarantees” that you’ll never get. They owe me at least $40 at this point and I’ve seen $2. It’s a total joke. Beyond the false promises, the app itself is glitchy, inaccurate, and frustrating to use. You will waste more time fighting for the pay you were promised than actually earning.Bottom line: This app is a scam. It preys on gig workers by advertising security that does not exist. Stick to more reputable platforms. This one is NOT worth the headache. [...] I’ll preface this by saying that this will be a longer review. While I’m unsure if the pay guarantee will ever come into play, the fact that an app like this exists is so huge. Pay by time recently came into my area but there’s one thing it does not include: time spent driving waiting for orders while you’re away from your starting location. I’ve been a dasher off and on since September 2020 and the one thing I’ve always complained about this app directly addresses. People that do this more than just occasionally often have to pick the orders they take because a lot of them just aren’t worth the gas let alone the time. I’m glad I don’t have to do that anymore. It’s huge for my motivation and mental health doing this job not having to decline well over half of orders and/or worrying [...] Work with Uber, Doordash, Instacart, Amazon Flex or other gig jobs? Take the uncertainty out of your app based gig work with insights, tools and guaranteed daily pay from Solo. Solo seamlessly connects your work accounts to a single app so that you can manage your income, track your expenses, project your taxes and guarantee your daily pay. If you optimize your schedule using Solo’s pay predictions and earn less, we’ll pay you the difference. How does it work? Download the app and link your gig work accounts Start tracking your income, expenses, estimated taxes and access personalized pay predictions Save thousands on taxes and earn up to 20% more per week FEATURES PAY PREDICTIONS & DAILY GUARANTEES We crunch the numbers using real earnings data from the Solo community in your city.
